title: digitalis × purpurascens var. fucata
intro: Digitalis × purpurascens var. fucata is a variety of foxglove plant, a biennial herbaceous plant with tall spikes of bell-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its cardiac glycosides, which have medicinal properties that help to regulate heart rhythms and increase cardiac contractility. The health benefits of Digitalis × purpurascens var. fucata include its ability to improve heart function, reduce symptoms of heart failure, and lower blood pressure. Digitalis × purpurascens var. fucata is typically prepared as a tincture or extract, which can be used to treat a range of cardiovascular conditions, under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
